_comment: This file is used as a reference. The actual dashboard is created by scripts/create_dashboard.ps1 using the Kibana Saved Objects API with inline Lens panels.

panels.title: Total Models
panels.description: Count of all models in the index

panels.title: Ranked Models
panels.description: Count of models with LMSYS quality data

panels.title: Top 10 Best Value LLMs
panels.description: Bar chart: models ranked by Value Score

panels.title: Models by Provider (Top 15)
panels.description: Bar chart: model count per provider

panels.title: Top Providers by Avg Value Score
panels.description: Bar chart: providers ranked by avg value score
